title: Trade Replay vs Screen Recording (2026): What's the Difference and Which One Actually Helps You Improve?
description: Tick-data trade replay (FX Replay, NinjaTrader, TradingView) shows you the chart. Screen recording shows you the whole session — every click, every news pop, every hesitation. Honest comparison of both, when each one wins, and which one futures traders actually need.

og.title: Trade Replay vs Screen Recording (2026): The Honest Comparison
og.description: Tick replay shows the chart. Screen recording shows the whole session. Which one actually helps you stop repeating the same mistake — and why most journals only give you half the picture.
